<!-- Keep the title concise (~70 chars). 标题简洁(~70 字符内)。 -->

## Summary / 摘要
<!-- What does this PR change and why? / 这个 PR 改了什么、为什么? -->

## Type / 类型
- [ ] Bug fix / 修复
- [ ] New tool or MCP entry / 新增工具或 MCP 条目
- [ ] Docs / translation / 文档或翻译
- [ ] Script / router change / 脚本或 router 改动

## Checklist / 检查清单
- [ ] No binaries, credentials, or samples committed / 未提交二进制、凭据或样本
- [ ] Manifest JSON validates / manifest JSON 校验通过
- [ ] `bootstrap.ps1` still dry-run-safe (no writes without `-Apply`) / `bootstrap.ps1` 仍 dry-run 安全
- [ ] New manifest entries link an official source + verification date / 新条目附官方源与核验日期
- [ ] README languages kept in sync if user-facing content changed / 改动面向用户内容时已同步多语言 README

## Testing / 测试
<!-- What did you run to verify? / 你跑了什么来验证? -->
